data.title: Phase II Study of Imatinib Mesylate in Patients With Life Threatening Malignant Rare Diseases
data.brief_summary: Exploratory study to examine the effect(s) of Imatinib mesylate treatment on life threatening rare diseases with known associations to one or more Imatinib mesylate -sensitive tyrosine kinases, and to identify the contribution of specific protein tyrosine kinases (PTKs) of that specific disease.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Patients ≥ 15 years of age
* Life threatening disease documented by conventional criteria to be resistant to standard, approved therapy.
* Experimental documentation of functional significance of either Abl, Kit (CD117), or PDGF-R in the relevant target tissue (preferably on a
endpoints: To examine the effect(s) of Imatinib mesylate treatment on life threatening rare diseases with known associations to one or more Imatinib mesylate-sensitive tyrosine kinases
To identify the contribution of specific protein tyrosine kinases (PTKs) of that specific disease
